## Epic

Quality and Delivery

## Description

- Create help page with categorized FAQs
- Add support contact form with validation and mock submit handling
- Include inline guidance for common transaction issues
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - FAQ accordions keyboard accessible and screen-reader friendly
  - Support form char counters and validation messages
  - Success state includes reference ID and next-step guidance

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] FAQ section is searchable and accessible
- [ ] Support form submits and handles errors
- [ ] Success and failure states are clear
- [ ] PR includes screenshots (FAQ expanded, form, submitted state)

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `support`, `priority-medium`
